rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped background citation supporting the general claim that visual design properties such as color can influence consumer responses. In the citing article, Gorn et al. (2004) is not discussed separately, and its specific mechanism, measures, or findings are not used to build hypotheses, design studies, or interpret results. Its role is therefore a broad literature example rather than a meaningful input to the paper's core asymmetry-brand personality framework.
